policy: Explanations and topic categorizations must not be presented as authoritative unless supported by the required subject sources.

requiredSources.name: Campbell Biology, latest available edition
requiredSources.role: primary textbook source for biology concept explanations

requiredSources.name: College Board AP Biology Course and Exam Description
requiredSources.role: primary AP framework source for topic categorization

requiredSources.name: College Board AP Chemistry Course and Exam Description
requiredSources.role: primary AP framework source for topic categorization

requiredSources.name: Princeton Review AP Chemistry
requiredSources.role: secondary AP-prep explanation cross-check when an approved copy/source is available

requiredSources.name: OpenStax Chemistry 2e
requiredSources.role: fallback general chemistry textbook when Princeton Review support is unavailable

requiredSources.name: College Board AP Physics Course and Exam Descriptions
requiredSources.role: primary AP framework source for topic categorization

requiredSources.name: OpenStax College Physics 2e
requiredSources.role: fallback peer-reviewed introductory physics textbook for explanations

displayRules: Question text and choices are accessible from uploaded source files.
Official answer letters may be used only when parsed from a paired official answer key.
Explanations must remain hidden or labeled non-authoritative until claim-level support is recorded.

Topic/unit labels may be displayed as AP-aligned study labels when they carry sourceReviewStatus=needs-authoritative-source-review; do not present them as authoritative verified classifications until mapped to required sources.
